meaning: n.死,无生气,死一样的状态
examples: The hardness and deadness are from within.
When we describe the moon as dead, we are describing the deadness in ourselves.
We've found the addition of the stainless inserts counteracts much of this potential deadness.
In what are (sometimes euphemistically) called the developing countries, one year seems to follow the next without any booms or busts, just deadness in the water.
